title: Tender Syrian Fernbrake Gosari Skillet
description: This dish features fernbrake gosari in a savory Syrian skillet, perfect for a brunch mood, with an emphasis on umami and juicy flavors, and is ayurvedic rajasic friendly.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the fernbrake gosari, salt, black pepper, and sumac, and stir to combine.
Pour in the lemon juice and water, and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 10 minutes, until the gosari is tender.
Toast the pita bread slices and cut them into wedges.
To serve, place a portion of the gosari mixture onto each plate, and serve with toasted pita bread on the side.
